d: Scarlita smashes the ground in the specified direction to create a 3-tile-wide Rock Wave, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in that direction and knocking them back to the edge of the battlefield. Scarlita then charges and strikes, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within the radius of a 2-tile arc and stunning them for [[1]]s. The skill damage is increased by [[10%]] for each surviving ally besides Scarlita. She is [[unaffected]] when casting this skill.
Increases the damage dealt by slash and strike to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases stun duration to [[1.5]]s.
Increases the damage of this skill by [[12%]] for each surviving ally besides Scarlita.
Increases stun duration to [[2]]s.

When a battle starts, Scarlita blinks to the backline, ascends to the sky, and hovers above the battlefield. While in the air, she is [[invincible]], recovering [[40]] Energy per second, and increasing [[2%]] ATK till the battle ends. [[15]]s into the battle or when there are [[2]] or fewer surviving non-summoned allies besides her, Scarlita descends near the [[frontmost]] enemy. She smashes the ground upon landing, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to the enemies within [[2]] tiles and knocking them into the air, stunning them for [[4]]s.
Scarlita recovers an extra [[150]] Energy if she descends after [[15]]s into the battle.
Scarlita gains an extra [[15%]] ATK boost till the end of battle if she descends after [[15]]s into a battle.
Increases damage to [[220%]]<ATK>.

Scarlita sends [[the weakest]] non-summoned ally a blessing while in the air, granting them a shield equal to [[15%]]<HP> of Scarlita's max HP for [[3]]s.
Every time Scarlita wields her axe after descending on the battlefield, she deals [[135%]]<ATK> damage to the enemies within a 2-tile arc and knocks them down. This skill damage increases by [[10%]] for each surviving non-summoned ally besides herself.
Increases the shield value to [[18%]]<HP> of Scarlita.
Increases the shield value to [[20%]]<HP> of Scarlita.
Increases the damage of this skill by [[12%]] for each surviving non-summoned ally other than Scarlita.
Scarlita increases Execution by [[4]] for each blessing she sends while in the air.
Scarlita increases Execution by [[5]] for each blessing she sends while in the air.
Scarlita increases Execution by [[6]] for each blessing she sends while in the air.
Scarlita deals true damage if there are at least [[4]] surviving non-summoned allies other than herself on the battlefield.
Scarlita deals true damage if there are at least [[3]] surviving non-summoned allies other than herself on the battlefield.

Scarlita's skills knock the non-boss enemies with HP lower than [[180%]]<ATK> and HP ratio below [[20%]] out of the battlefield. The enemy sent out the combat this way cannot return and is considered defeated.

Scarlita's skills knock the non-boss enemies with HP lower than [[180%]]<ATK> and HP ratio below [[25%]] out of the battlefield. The enemy sent out the combat this way cannot return and is considered defeated.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 25 Crit, 25 Execution.

d: Scarlita increases an allied hero's Phys DEF and Magic DEF when using Valkyrie Spirit to protect them, with the amount equal to [[50%]] of Scarlita's own Phys DEF and Magic DEF.

If an ally's HP ratio drops below [[20%]] while Scarlita is in the air during Sanctified Verdict, she instantly grants them a shield that blocks [[120%]]<HP> damage for [[10]]s. This effect can trigger once per battle. If the shield is not activated by the time Scarlita descends from midair, Sanctified Verdict's ground smash will affect the entire battlefield and deals [[75%]] more damage.
